proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 309
; Guard: if (regressions > 0) { console.log(); console.log(...) }
; Prove: regressions > 0 when line 309 executes

(declare-const regressions Int)
(declare-const line_309_executes Int)

; Transition: guarded by if (regressions > 0)
(assert (>= regressions 0))
(assert (=> (= line_309_executes 1) (> regressions 0)))

; Attempt to falsify: blank log fires with regressions <= 0
(assert (= line_309_executes 1))
(assert (<= regressions 0))
(check-sat)
